verses.text: Pasian aw, ka thumna aw hong za in la, gallauna panin kei hong kem in
namsau taat bangin a leii uh a taatte, thaltang bangin thu hoihlo a ngimte
a buk simna panun mawhbaanglo mi a kapte, lau hetloin thakhatin amah a kapte' kiang panin kei hong liah in
Amaute in thusia bekbek ngaihsun niloh uh hi. Amaute in thangsiah sim ding gen uh a, “Eite kua in hong mu ding ahi hiam
Eite' mawhna kua in phawkzo ding ahi hiam? Siam mahmahna tawh i sawmsimna i vaihawm hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte' sung thu leh a lungsim ngaihsutna uh thuk mahmah hi
Ahih hangin Pasian in a thaltang tawh amaute kapgawp ding a, amaute khempeuh thakhatin liam ding uh hi
Amau' kampaunate hangin amaute siatna thuaksak ding a, amaute a mu khempeuh in a lu uh peisan ding uh hi
Tua ciangin mi khempeuh lau ding uh hi. Amaute in Pasian' hihsa thute gengen ding uh a, ama hihsa nate khempeuh ngaihsunsun ding uh hi
Topa' nasepna hangin midikte lungdam ding uh a, amah a bel ding uh hi. Lungsim thutangte khempeuh in amah a phat ding uh hi.
